plugins.name: domain-teams
plugins.description: Domain team skills — planning (企画), code, design, research, copywriting with checkpoint-based quality gates

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian vault workflows — daily notes, markdown, bases, diagrams, canvas, file intel, vault management, dashboard design. Plus an LLM wiki knowledge-distillation layer (6 wiki-* skills) on top of vault notes. ⚠️ Most skills are Cowork-compatible; the `defuddle` skill needs Claude Code CLI (subprocess + external URL fetch).

plugins.name: philosophers-toolkit
plugins.description: Philosophical thinking frameworks for problem clarification and deeper reasoning. 哲學思考框架・問題釐清。哲学的思考フレームワーク。

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Developer workflow skills — skill creation (skill-creator-advance), skill quality scoring (skill-judge, 8-dimension rubric), portable git-backed project memory (git-memory), multi-item proposal triage (proposal-critique), deletion-first change critique (complexity-critique), token / structure refactor for existing skills with output equivalence (skill-refactor, multi-judge ensemble + git ratchet), and human-judged output quality A/B for existing skills (skill-tuning, blind variants + constitutional pre-filter + preference log → RLHF-lite). Git コミット・メモリ・スキル品質評価・複雑度クリティーク・skill リファクタ・スキル チューニング。可攜式專案記憶・技能品質評估・提案審查・複雜度評析・skill 重構・skill 調整。

plugins.name: investing-toolkit
plugins.description: Investing research toolkit v2.1.0 — three-layer architecture (Data / Analysis / Report). 5 country-bundled data skills (US/JP/TW/KR/CN), 6 pure-compute analysis skills (DCF, comps, screener, technical, portfolio, macro-regime — Phase 1 per-country classifiers per ADR-0004), 4 report orchestrators (memo, snapshot, portfolio review, screener list) with runtime peer-discovery. 投資調査・美股・台股・日股・韓股・中國股。投資研究工具組。 ⚠️ Claude Code CLI only — Cowork sandbox blocks external data fetches.

plugins.name: copywriting-toolkit
plugins.description: Pipeline-structured copywriting toolkit — 14 specialized skills (intake, ideation, neta injection, 5 form-specific drafters, voice positioning, voice tone, ethics gate, form gate, audit). Grounded in 神田昌典 PASONA, 谷山雅計 discipline, Cialdini, Schwartz, FTC Endorsement / 景品表示法 ethics. 文案寫作工具組。コピーライティング・パイプライン。

plugins.name: gws-toolkit
plugins.description: Generic Google Workspace toolkit layered on the official googleworkspace/cli (gws). Vendors upstream gws-shared / gws-drive / gws-docs / gws-slides / gws-sheets API reference skills, plus toolkit-original setup automation, design knowledge (Minto / SCQA / chart-selection for Slides), and safety wrappers (trash-default delete, appProperties provenance tagging). Successor to slides-toolkit (Phase 3 deprecated 2026-05-06). Not affiliated with Google. ⚠️ Claude Code CLI only — Cowork sandbox blocks Google API calls.

plugins.name: translation-toolkit
plugins.description: High-quality translation across i18n / technical docs / ad copy / novel chapters for EN / JA / ZH-TW / ZH-CN with bundled CC-BY glossary (~10K+ entries) and 6-gate verification (placeholder integrity / glossary compliance / deterministic post-translation linter / back-translation / register / untranslatability). v0.3.0 adds: novel whole-book pre-pass (character + world-glossary extraction), 5D literary critic (rhythm / euphony / archaism / register-shift), M3 deterministic linter for novel + doc, and cheap-model split for cost-amortized pre-pass.

plugins.name: tsundoku
plugins.description: Tsundoku 積読 — your owned-but-unread e-book pile, turned into actionable knowledge. Search a Kobo library by title / author / series / publication date / category / description text / reading status / language, download chosen books as DRM-free EPUBs via subdavis/kobo-book-downloader, convert downloaded EPUBs into chunked-by-chapter Markdown, then distill the book into a coherent set of executable agent skills via the RIA-TV++ pipeline (Adler → 5 parallel extractors → triple verification → RIA++ render → Zettelkasten linking → adversarial pressure test, adapted from kangarooking/cangjie-skill). Optional Calibre PDF conversion. macOS / Linux. Language-adaptive output (EN / 日本語 / 繁體中文). ⚠️ Claude Code CLI only — Cowork sandbox blocks external data fetches (kobo.com auth + EPUB downloads).

plugins.name: four-dx-coach
plugins.description: Multi-scope coach for The 4 Disciplines of Execution — personal solo (agent = peer-witness), team-leader (agent = consultant), team-member (agent = personal coach to inherited-WIG situation). 12 skills with v0.8.0 dual-mode architecture: every topic skill supports both **coach-mode** (Socratic dialogue, fit-check inclusive, walks you step-by-step from zero via `protocols/coach-mode.md`) AND **audit-mode** (single-layer synthesis from one existing artifact at that topic's layer via `protocols/audit-mode.md`). Skill inventory: 1 plugin router (`using-four-dx-coach`) + 10 dual-mode topic skills (5 multi-file scope-flex — meta-strategy-triage, d1-wig-formulation, d2-lead-measures, d3-scoreboard, d4-cadence; 5 single-file scope-specific — meta-whirlwind-triage, d1-wig-cascade, meta-team-leader-onboarding, meta-xps-evaluation, sustain-momentum-rescue) + 1 cross-layer aggregator (`4dx-audit`) reserved for multi-artifact spanning ≥2 D-layers OR layer-unknown failures. How to choose mode: artifact at single layer → that topic skill's audit-mode; artifacts across layers OR layer unknown → `4dx-audit` cross-layer aggregator; vague intent / cold-start → `using-four-dx-coach` router. Multi-file skills self-detect scope (personal / team-leader / team-member) via internal Socratic disambiguation; single-file skills are scope-locked because the source book has no cross-scope variant. All skills industry-grounded — Boundary sections cite primary academic + regulatory + credentialed-author sources beyond the source book (Goodhart 1975 / Kotter 1996 / Tufte 1983 / Reinertsen 2009 / Doerr 2018 / Akao 1991 / Edmondson 2018 / Pfeffer 2010 / Drucker HBR 1999 / Senge 1990 / Lencioni 2002 / Pfeffer-Sutton 2006 / CFPB / VA OIG / etc.) — addresses book's selection-bias and member-POV gaps. Personal scope walks one user through full 4DX adoption. Team-leader scope covers Primary WIG selection, Targets-not-Plans cascade, leader-onboarding, lead-measure facilitation, scoreboard design, facilitator-mode WIG Session, and XPS audit. Team-member scope helps you comprehend an inherited team WIG, identify sphere of influence on inherited leads, read team scoreboard, prep weekly commitment, and self-account honestly. Distilled from McChesney/Covey/Huling/Thele/Walker, *The 4 Disciplines of Execution* (2nd ed., 2021) via tsundoku:book-distill RIA-TV++ pipeline; Plan U merge 2026-04-30 collapsed 26 skills → 11; v0.7.0 added consultant-mode entry point; v0.8.0 introduced dual-mode topic skills + repositioned `4dx-audit` as cross-layer aggregator. Multilingual triggers (EN / 日本語 / 繁體中文); skill bodies in English. NOT for enterprise multi-team rollout (read book Part 2 directly), habit formation (atomic habits), or portfolio betting (OKR / lean experiments).

plugins.name: repo-wiki
plugins.description: LLM Wiki pattern for code repos. Init scans the entire src/ tree for complete entity coverage and seeds each module with its recent commits, plus a bounded global git scan; full-history era backfill is opt-in (init full-history). Grow the knowledge base incrementally from changes or conversational context (ingest, polymorphic), and query it with natural language (query) — Eager src/ verification at key moments. Knowledge lives in a hidden .repo-wiki/ directory committed alongside your code; src/ remains the source of truth. Zero external dependencies — pure SKILL.md, no MCP servers or vector stores.

plugins.name: dbt-wiki
plugins.description: Local-only LLM-queryable knowledge base for dbt projects. No dbt Cloud required. Init reads target/manifest.json (model metadata, ref/source lineage, schema.yml columns, tests) plus target/compiled/**/*.sql parsed via sqlglot to extract column-level lineage, plus dbt/models/**/*.sql raw files for SQL/jinja inline comments. Generates one markdown entity per model/source/macro under .dbt-wiki/, plus DAG visualization and tier/materialization indices. Refresh updates from new manifest snapshots; Ingest adds user-supplied context notes (preserved across refresh); Query answers natural-language questions about model structure, column-level data flow, materialization config, test coverage, refactoring impact (rename/delete propagation), and tribal knowledge from inline comments and user notes. Coexists with repo-wiki: dbt-wiki for STRUCTURE + dbt-internal context, repo-wiki for cross-cutting WHY. Scripts use PEP 723 inline metadata; sqlglot is auto-installed via `uv run` (recommended) or via `pip install sqlglot` if using plain python3.

plugins.name: deconstruct-toolkit
plugins.description: Reverse-engineer polished artifacts (copy, document packs, UI, arguments, products, organizations) — surface design blueprints, hidden frameworks, rhetorical mechanisms, and intentional omissions. Cultural-variant lenses for EN / JA / ZH (rhetoric / persuasion / genre / frame). Grounded in Burke, Toulmin, Hinds, 劉勰《文心雕龍》, Goffman, Lakoff, Doi, Hu/Hwang, Cialdini, Brignull, Swales/Bhatia, Nielsen-Norman, 山口周『武器になる哲学』. 制作物・論証・製品の脱構築 (英日中文化バリアント対応)。作品・論證・產品的逆向解構工具組（英日中文化變體）。

plugins.name: systems-thinking-toolkit
plugins.description: Systems thinking toolkit grounded in Dennis Sherwood, Seeing the Forest for the Trees (2002). 7 functional skills + 1 router. Carry-1 cld-craft (prose → fully-annotated Mermaid CLD; 12 hygiene rules + Rule 7 fuzzy elevation + R/B classification + Sterman uniflow discipline; v0.8 optional CLD falsifiability protocol). Downstream: cld-archetypes (limits-to-growth + variance/target/action), cld-overlay (outward stakeholder straddle), team-mental-model (inward convergence + leadership energy proxies), strategy-lever-and-cascade (v0.6 Martian-test inline; v0.7 STOP rule + HOLD-lever), simulation-modeling (CLD → stock-flow; v0.10 adds **executable Python companion** — single-file PEP-723 simulator with Euler integration, JSON CLD spec input, CSV + ASCII-chart output, 21-test analytical-tolerance suite covering exponential R-loop / goal-seeking B-loop / logistic limits-to-growth / Lotka-Volterra predator-prey — closes Sherwood Ch 12-13 ithink/Stella gap with stdlib-only manager-grade tooling). Plus V1-weak manager-personality-quadrant with v0.9 Graduate Routing decision tree. v0.9 adds 4 platform-economy R-loop cases (Case 13 network effects / Case 14 two-sided market / Case 15 winner-take-most algorithm concentration / Case A5 platform saturation limits-to-growth) filling Sherwood's pre-2010 platform-economy blind spot. Distilled via tsundoku:book-distill RIA-TV++ pipeline. システム思考ツールキット — Sherwood 2002 ベース。系統思考工具組 — Sherwood 2002 為本。

plugins.name: legal-toolkit
plugins.description: In-house legal toolkit for 台灣 SME → 上市櫃 法務 — 7-layer schema-driven contract review (Stark / Adams / Burnham + Taiwan overlay: 強行/任意 規定二分 / 定型化契約 §247-1 / 六準則解釋), playbook-driven negotiation (visible per-clause Markdown + variant-folder schema, ABAC pre-filter, walk-away / fallback / preferred 三層 escalation), and disclaimer-driven outputs (Mandatory Disclaimer + Escalation Override on high-risk findings). 3 skills: using-legal-toolkit (router) + legal-playbook-author (bootstrap/extend/revise) + legal-contract-review (review/redline/nda mode). v0.2.0 (Phase 1.5) expanded bundled fallback from 4 to 8 clauses (variant-folder limitation-of-liability / indemnification / data-protection-dpa keyed by deal_size or jurisdiction + flat ip-assignment-and-license) and added Python scripts (discover_playbook / validate_schema / detect_conflicts / abac_filter / build_baseline / seed_baseline) plus JSON Schema 2020-12 frontmatter validation. v0.3.0 (Phase 1.6) adds the eval-tier rubric (20-criterion answer + 10-criterion source + 12-criterion playbook-quality, each tagged deterministic vs semantic) and self_grade.py that runs the 22 deterministic checks against contract-review output (writes self-grade.md), plus a calibration procedure for hand-grading 5-10 contracts against Pearson targets ≥ 0.6 / ≥ 0.7. v0.3.1 dogfood-driven patches: L7 Step 1.5 stance-asymmetry pass; L6 sub-check 4 vagueness scan; L7 Step 9.3 citation applicability gate; SRC-04 + statute-articles.json blacklist closes SRC-09 escape via fabricated sub-articles + deprecated §27; banner placement narrowed; NDA mode dispatch aligned; findings.json schema documented. v0.3.2 second-pass dogfood patches: L7 Step 0 asset identification pass (favorable existing clauses surface as favorable_position_notes instead of being invisible); L6 Step 2.5 dedup pass (missing-items + vagueness gaps merge into parent L7 finding when overlapping); L7 Step 9.3.0 soft case-citation rule (forbids case-number patterns unless WebFetch-verified in session OR listed in assets/statute-articles.json#cases_verified); 7 fabricated judicial case citations REMOVED from bundled fallback baselines (replaced with statute + 王澤鑑 / 王文宇 commentary doctrine pointers). v0.3.3 Phase 1.7 bundled-vs-runtime architecture refactor: cache-then-fetch-then-LLM workflow for all statute / case / function-letter citations; assets/legal-sources.json (12 statutes + judgment.judicial.gov.tw direct-data + 7 主管機關 search URLs); scripts/cache_check.py + scripts/build_citation_url.py with 43 new tests; L7 Step 9.3.1/9.3.2/9.3.3 protocol additions; .legal-toolkit/cache/ TTL-based cache (30d statute / 7d case / 30d function letter); offline-graceful with runtime_verified=false marker (NO silent LLM training-data substitution); fetch budget cap (default 10 unique citations / run, configurable via config.example.yml); citations[].runtime_verified + cache_path + amendment_note fields; top-level runtime_fetch_summary telemetry. v0.3.4 Phase 1.8 output consolidation: 7 output files reduced to 3 — legal.md (lawyer/GC/ops audience, absorbs former issues + escalation + memo-legal + redline + favorable + self-grade-summary), business.md (non-lawyer audience), findings.json (canonical SoT + new self_grade block absorbing former self-grade.md); banner placement narrowed to legal.md only (business.md never carries banner). v0.3.5 Phase 1.9 audit-driven polish + NDA fallback: (P0a) legal.md §QA back-fill via <!-- self_grade:start/end --> markers closes v0.3.4 stale-render bug; (P0b) business.md §主要 Redline 重點 light-touch reformat (Why + 修正方向 + Timing + cross-ref to legal.md, NOT full clause body — non-lawyer overload caught by audit); (P0c) [!danger] vs [!warning] signal split (placeholder warnings no longer dilute high-risk callout); (C) 3 NDA-native fallback baselines added (deemed-breach-cascade / disclosing-party-indemnity / assignment-prohibition) closing §2.2/§2.3/§5.1/§11 gaps caught across 3 audit rounds; 4 → 7 runtime cold-start baselines (tarball regen deferred to v0.3.6); 171 tests pass. English skill instructions + zh-TW domain content + bilingual triggers. v0.3.6 Phase 1.10 cross-skill plumbing refactor: legal-sources.json promoted to plugin-level scripts/canonical/ SoT (mirror of translation-toolkit pattern); scripts/distribute.py deploys byte-identical functional copies to each consuming skill's assets/; scripts/verify-drift.py CI gate fails PRs on any drift. Unblocks Phase 2 (legal-document-draft + legal-incident-response) sibling-skill access without violating self-contained-skill convention. v0.4.0 Phase 2 ships legal-document-draft (4 modes — privacy / ToS / DPA / NDA): skeleton-and-LLM-fill templates pinned to current in-force Taiwan law (Path A from SP2 verify run); 2-file audience-shaped output (<doc-type>.md publish-ready + compliance.md 法務 review); hand-curated per-mode compliance checklists with statute citations (個資法 §8 八款 / §9 / §21 / §27 / 民法 §12-13/§227/§247-1/§250 / 消保法 §11-1/§17/§19 / 公平交易法); deterministic structural grading (no orphan {{vars}} / verdict coverage / canonical TBD ids / truncation guard); legal-playbook/profile.yml as shared company identity SoT; 委託/受託 model (NOT GDPR controller-processor); safe defaults for items deferred to PDPC 子法 (Phase 2.5 migration template documented). Cross-skill: shares legal-playbook/confidentiality.md stance with legal-contract-review nda mode; references legal-sources.json URL templates at template authoring time (NOT runtime fetch). Phase 2-5 adds document-draft / incident-response / issue-spot / research / contract-tracker / regulation-watch / corporate-governance / dd-quickscan — see ROADMAP.md. v0.4.1 SP3a dogfood patches: P0 fix template-privacy.md 民法 §12 成年年齡 (template 殘存 pre-2020-amendment 「未滿二十歲」 — corrected to 「未滿十八歲」 per 2023-01-01 民法 修正; statute-citations.md amended in lockstep); P1 add Path A anti-pattern grep to grade_draft.py (rejects 「未滿二十歲」 / 「72 小時」 / 「controller-processor」 / 「資料控管者」 in published <doc-type>.md output — catches future research-to-template author drift before grader passes; compliance.md still allowed to cite anti-patterns in 「NOT X」 explanatory form); P1 move template-nda.md authoring note 「典型範圍 3-7 年；技術機密可延至 10 年或永久」 into HTML comment (no longer leaks into delivered counterparty NDA) + drop undocumented {{survival_years_explanation}} variable; P1 restructure template-privacy.md §3 特種個資 awkward parenthetical into clean heading + paragraph form (avoids 「如蒐集 §6 特種個資 (不主動蒐集 §6 特種個資…)」 self-contradicting rendered output); 201 tests pass (was 194 + 7 new parameterized anti-pattern tests). Self-dogfood audit at docs/superpowers/audits/2026-05-13-legal-document-draft-sp3a-dogfood.md. v0.4.2 Phase 2 closeout ships legal-incident-response (3-path classifier — 個資外洩 / 主管機關函覆 / 合約違約): auto-classify + confirm path routing; audience-shaped 2-file output (legal.md + business.md) with optional handoff-context.json for contract-breach delegation; ISO 8601 timeline section with ⏳ markers for未發 anchors; mixed per-path authoring (PII skeleton+LLM / Authority pure-LLM / Contract-breach delegate); single grade_response.py per-path branch sharing Path A anti-pattern bank with v0.4.1 SP3a; profile.yml schema v1 → v2 (+2 optional fields external_counsel + regulatory_authorities; backward-compat v1 profiles); legal-toolkit/scripts/canonical/ SSOT extends to cover pdpa-current-state.md + tbd-migration-template.md + profile-schema.yml + load_profile.py (distributed to both legal-document-draft + legal-incident-response functional copies via distribute.py); router Q5 dispatch activated; contract-breach 違約 path delegates to legal-contract-review via handoff-context.json (soft delegation; user manually invokes; --seed flag consumption deferred to v0.4.3); zh-TW only (multi-language via translation-toolkit). Closes Phase 2 of legal-toolkit ROADMAP (累計 5 skills active: router + playbook-author + contract-review + document-draft + incident-response). Phase 3 IRAC cluster (legal-issue-spot + legal-research) is next.
